---
title: "Untitled"
format: gfm
---

## Goal

Goal is to read a bib file with my published works & convert it to yaml for subsequent use in my cv.

I don't need to create one file for each type of publication, I think...

## Using pandoc


pandoc pubs.bib -s -f biblatex -t markdown > pubs.yaml

https://kevcaz.insileco.io/notes/biblio/bib2yaml_pandoc/
